title: The Preserving Machine and Other Stories
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A short story collection first published in 1969, anchored by the title story about a machine that transforms musical compositions into living creatures to preserve them. The collection showcases Dick's inventive short fiction from the 1950s and 1960s. Ace Books EPUB edition.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip K. - The Preserving Machine (1969, Ace Books) - libgen.li.epub
